rows.name: STAGING_BUFFER_POOL_CLASS_CAP
rows.provenance: Existing WGPU staging buffer pool class bound; prevents unbounded class fanout in descriptor allocation.
rows.override_path: not operator configurable; changing this requires buffer-pool ABI review

rows.name: BIND_GROUP_CACHE_CAP
rows.provenance: Existing WGPU bind-group cache bound; controls memory growth from descriptor reuse.
rows.override_path: compiled default -> tool.toml -> CLI override for cache-capacity tuning

rows.name: TIERING_EVENT_CAPACITY_MIN
rows.provenance: Existing minimum event-log capacity for WGPU buffer pool tiering telemetry.
rows.override_path: compiled default -> tool.toml -> CLI override for telemetry-capacity tuning

rows.name: TIERING_EVENT_CAPACITY_MAX
rows.provenance: Existing maximum event-log capacity for WGPU buffer pool tiering telemetry.
rows.override_path: compiled default -> tool.toml -> CLI override for telemetry-capacity tuning

rows.name: DEFAULT_THRESHOLD
rows.provenance: Existing WGPU tiered cache promotion threshold; controls when entries graduate to hotter storage.
rows.override_path: compiled default -> tool.toml -> CLI override for cache-promotion tuning

rows.name: DEFAULT_EXTRACTION_ITER_BUDGET
rows.provenance: Existing equality-saturation extraction iteration budget; bounds optimizer compile time.
rows.override_path: compiled default -> tool.toml -> CLI override for optimizer-budget tuning

rows.name: DEFAULT_INLINE_THRESHOLD
rows.provenance: Existing region inline operation threshold; controls cleanup pass inlining aggressiveness.
rows.override_path: compiled default -> tool.toml -> CLI override for optimizer-pass tuning

rows.name: SHAPE_FACT_CACHE_CAP
rows.provenance: Existing optimizer shape-fact cache bound; caps per-program analysis memoization.
rows.override_path: compiled default -> tool.toml -> CLI override for optimizer-cache tuning

rows.name: EMPTY_TEMPLATE_CACHE_CAP
rows.provenance: Existing empty-template cache bound for megakernel builder reuse.
rows.override_path: compiled default -> tool.toml -> CLI override for megakernel-cache tuning

rows.name: GRID_PLAN_CACHE_CAP
rows.provenance: Existing grid-plan cache bound for megakernel planner reuse.
rows.override_path: compiled default -> tool.toml -> CLI override for grid-plan cache tuning

rows.name: LAUNCH_RECOMMENDATION_CACHE_CAP
rows.provenance: Existing megakernel launch recommendation cache bound; caps policy-memory growth.
rows.override_path: compiled default -> tool.toml -> CLI override for launch-policy cache tuning

rows.name: RESERVED_MAX_RANGE_MIN
rows.provenance: Megakernel protocol reserved opcode range floor; part of the wire protocol, not a runtime tuning knob.
rows.override_path: not operator configurable; changing this requires protocol compatibility review

rows.name: STARVATION_THRESHOLD
rows.provenance: Existing scheduler starvation threshold; controls tenant fairness intervention.
rows.override_path: compiled default -> tool.toml -> CLI override for scheduler fairness tuning

rows.name: TENANT_FAIRNESS_THRESHOLD
rows.provenance: Existing scheduler tenant fairness threshold; controls cross-tenant intervention.
rows.override_path: compiled default -> tool.toml -> CLI override for scheduler fairness tuning
